title: Symlinking a directory does not cause a reresolve of imports
rootCauseDescription: Folder watch event for a newly-symlinked directory is dropped because the gating conditions (parent has __init__ OR program already contains sources in path) both fail for a brand-new directory appearing via symlink.
verifierNotes: This is a file-watcher integration issue. Cannot be fully validated with pylanceLanguageInfo alone. Requires either a real VS Code workspace (pylancePlaywright) or the Jest service-layer test preserved from the prior investigation. The prior investigation probe at packages/pyright/packages/pyright-internal/src/tests/.generated/issue5807.symlinkWatcher.test.ts confirmed the behavior at the service layer.
